name: HangZhou Radical Energy Saving Technology Co., Ltd.
summary: HangZhou Radical Energy Saving Technology Co., Ltd. engages in the research, design, manufacture, and sale of automotive bearings. It offers wheel bearings and hub units, tapered roller bearings, belt tensioners and pulleys, clutch release bearings, tripods for C.V. joints, and other products. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Hangzhou, China.
